   886→rbf_delete() {
   887→  zrbf_sentinel
   888→
   889→  local z_locator="${1:-}"
   890→  local z_force="${2:-}"
   891→
   892→  # Documentation block
   893→  buc_doc_brief "Delete an image tag from the registry by locator"
   894→  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format (e.g., rbev-busybox:20251231T160211Z-img)"
   895→  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
   896→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   897→
   898→  # Validate locator parameter
   899→  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"
   900→
   901→  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
   902→  case "${z_locator}" in
   903→    *:*) : ;;
   904→    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
   905→  esac
   906→  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
   907→  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
   908→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
   909→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
   910→
   911→  # Check for --force flag
   912→  local z_skip_confirm=false
   913→  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
   914→    z_skip_confirm=true
   915→  fi
   916→
   917→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
   918→
   919→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
   920→  local z_token
   921→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   922→
   923→  # Confirm deletion unless --force
   924→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
   925→    buc_require "Will delete: ${z_locator}" "yes"
   926→  fi
   927→
   928→  buc_step "Deleting: ${z_locator}"
   929→
   930→  # Delete by tag reference
   931→  local z_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
   932→  local z_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
   933→
   934→  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
   935→    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   936→    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
   937→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   938→    -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
   939→    -o "${z_response_file}"                           \
   940→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
   941→    > "${z_status_file}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed"
   942→
   943→  local z_http_code
   944→  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
   945→  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
   946→
   947→  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
   948→    local z_body="empty"
   949→    if test -f "${z_response_file}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_response_file}"); fi
   950→    buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
   951→    buc_die "Delete failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
   952→  fi
   953→
   954→  buc_success "Deleted or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
